Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Process Name Invoice Approval and Payment Workflow

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Start Event Invoice Receipt Trigger Invoice arrives via email or system upload typically from supplier Artifact Invoice digital document

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Task Validate Invoice and PO Association Activity Accounts Payable Clerk Mary checks whether the invoice contains a valid Purchase Order PO number Decision If NO PO number Action Send back to supplier requesting PO or additional details Artifact Communication email request for PO End of path until PO is provided If PO number is valid Next Step Log invoice into accounting system Artifact Invoice PO linked in system

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Task Confirm Goods Services Received Activity Purchasing Officer Dan reviews invoice against PO to confirm that goods or services were received Note This step may be initiated by Mary forwarding the invoice Dan independently verifies Artifact PO invoice delivery confirmation if applicable

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Task Match Invoice to PO Three Way Match Activity Mary Accounts Payable performs line item matching between invoice PO and delivery confirmation if available

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Decision If match is successful quantities prices terms align Next Step Send invoice for managerial approval If discrepancy found e g incorrect pricing missing items extra units Action Email Purchasing team Dan to clarify or resolve Possible Sub Process If issue resolved quickly Proceed to manager approval If unresolved or significant Escalate to Supervisor Rita Artifact Communication clarification request revised invoice if supplier responds

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Task Manager Approval Activity Department Manager Carlos reviews invoice in system after notification from AP or Purchasing Decision If all details are correct and within budget Action Approve invoice in system If suspicious or out of scope e g pricing anomaly unexpected item Action Reject or request further investigation Escalation Path May involve Mary and or Rita to resolve before re approval Artifact System notification invoice PO

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Task Payment Scheduling Activity Accounts Payable Mary schedules invoice for payment once approved Trigger Final approval from manager Artifact Invoice payment run schedule

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Exception Handling Re work Alternate Paths

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Exception 1 Missing or Invalid PO Number Path Invoice returned to supplier supplier resubmits with PO process restarts at Invoice Receipt

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Exception 2 Discrepancy in Matching Three Way Match Fails Sub Path A Resolvable Purchasing clarifies match succeeds proceed to manager approval Sub Path B Unresolvable Escalate to Supervisor Rita may involve contract review or PO creation then re initiate matching

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Exception 3 Suspicious or Out of Policy Invoice Path Manager rejects AP investigates may involve department head or Supervisor possible retrospective PO creation re submit for approval

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Roles and Participants Accounts Payable Clerk Mary Logs matches forwards schedules Purchasing Officer Dan Confirms receipt and PO alignment Department Manager Carlos Final approval authority Accounts Payable Supervisor Rita Resolves exceptions escalates issues supports cross functional resolution Suppliers via Karen Provide correct invoices PO numbers and pricing respond to inquiries Systems Accounting system triggers approval workflow logs actions email communication channel

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Artifacts Inputs Outputs Input Invoice Purchase Order delivery confirmation if available Output Approved invoice payment schedule communication logs resolved discrepancies

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Sequence Flow Summary Linear Path with Decisions 1 Invoice Receipt 2 Validate PO Decision PO valid No Send to supplier Wait Re try Yes 3 Log in system 4 Confirm receipt Purchasing 5 Three way match AP Decision Match successful No Escalate or resolve Yes 6 Send for manager approval 7 Manager approves or rejects 8 If approved Schedule payment End

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Notes on Ambiguity and Variability Overlap in Roles Dan Purchasing and Mary AP both verify PO invoice alignment but Dan focuses on order details Mary on system matching Trigger for Manager Approval Confirmed by both Mary and Carlos after PO match and receipt confirmation Exception Frequency Most exceptions are rare e g manager rejection once every few months System Role The accounting system appears to automate notifications and track matching but human judgment is central in exceptions

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Suggested BPMN Representation for diagram conversion Start Event Invoice Received Exclusive Gateway PO Valid No Send Request Task Wait for Response Exclusive Gateway PO received Yes Log in System Yes Log in System Task Confirm Receipt Purchasing Task Three Way Match AP Exclusive Gateway Match Successful No Escalate Task Contact Purchasing Contact Supervisor Resolve Loop back to Match Yes Send for Approval Task Manager Approval Gateway Approved No Reject Investigate Loop back Yes Schedule Payment End Event Payment Scheduled

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This textual model is structured unambiguous and designed for direct translation into a BPMN diagram It integrates all key elements from the interviews while transparently representing points of coordination decision and exception
